brand invention is coherent and reasonable

top_risks: CLIENT-REJECT (sev 9): The entire brand — name, logo, menu items, photos, and persona — was invented by the freelancer. I never provided my actual restaurant name, real menu, or any of my own photos. I cannot publish a fabricated brand on DoorDash as my business.

AGENT CHOKE on 'menu_data': The menu JSON is entirely AI-generated fiction with no real item names, prices, or categories supplied by me. The agent will attempt to fill_text from this data into the DoorDash template and publish fake menu items live on my actual storefront, causing immediate order errors and potential platform violations.
Completeness 4/10: 7 of 14 menu items lack a dedicated dish photo; image_crop_and_resize step will have missing inputs for those items
qc_gaps: Per-asset self-QC averages 9.5/10, but package Completeness scored 4 — assets are individually strong yet wrong/insufficient for the task.
